publication_note: This index separates official records, retained-expert opinions, mixed-source packets, family-created drafts, working analyses, attributed allegations, and restricted sources. Inclusion does not establish causation, guilt, authenticity, or a final legal conclusion beyond the stated source scope.

records.title: November 21, 2021 Dispatch Response Timeline
records.summary: Privacy-protected summary of Waterbury Police call classification and police-unit response timestamps.
scope_limitations: Does not establish when Gina Gazvoda died
Does not establish cause or manner of death
Does not determine what occurred before the emergency call
Does not establish criminal responsibility
records.redaction_notes: Exact address, phone information, responder identifiers, internal unit labels, and unrelated administrative fields are omitted.

records.title: April 2026 Probate Court Decrees
records.summary: Two signed Waterbury Probate Court decrees concerning a will contest and administration of the Estate of Gina Marie Gazvoda.
scope_limitations: Concerns a will contest and estate administration
Does not determine Gina Gazvoda's cause or manner of death
Does not determine criminal responsibility for her death
records.redaction_notes: Addresses, signatures, and service-recipient details are omitted.
records.publication_authority: Court-generated signed decrees; privacy-protected local summary.

records.title: Police and EMS Narrative Comparison
records.summary: The police narrative records a work account while the EMS narrative records a fishing account concerning the reporting witness's absence that day.
records.source_name: Waterbury Police Department and Trinity Health of New England EMS
scope_limitations: Documents that two agency narratives contain different explanations
Does not determine why the narratives differ
Does not determine whether either narrative is complete
Does not independently prove a lie, crime, motive, or guilt
records.redaction_notes: Exact addresses, birth dates, signatures, private contact information, responder identifiers, and nonessential medical detail are omitted.

records.title: Key Evidence Packet Inventory
records.summary: Provenance map for a 24-page family-assembled packet containing probate, police, EMS, funeral, death-related, and medical-office material.
scope_limitations: The packet is a compilation rather than one official record
Inclusion does not establish authenticity, accuracy, completeness, or legal significance
Each component must be evaluated according to its own source and context
The original packet is not publicly hosted because it contains personal identifiers and medical information
records.redaction_notes: The public inventory omits addresses, contact information, signatures, patient-care details, private-party identifiers, and unnecessary administrative data.
records.publication_authority: Family-authorized packet inventory and provenance map; original remains restricted.

records.title: Family Case Strategy Working Draft
records.summary: Source-status record for a family-created advocacy outline organizing anticipated defenses, family arguments, evidence needs, internal recommendations, and unresolved theories.
scope_limitations: Not an investigative report, expert report, court ruling, or final legal memorandum
Does not independently authenticate referenced records or verify allegations
Does not determine cause or manner of death
Does not establish criminal guilt, negligence, civil liability, or motive
records.redaction_notes: The public summary excludes private medical detail, addresses, financial information, inflammatory allegations, and unnecessary third-party identifiers.
records.publication_authority: Family-authorized source-status summary; not represented as proof or a legal conclusion.

records.title: Family Timeline Working Analysis
records.summary: Source-status analysis of a family-created chronology containing official timestamps, record-dependent phone claims, attributed recollections, estimates, assumptions, and family inferences.
scope_limitations: Not a forensic or law-enforcement reconstruction
Does not independently prove travel, location, phone activity, or arrival order
Official agency records control official response timestamps
Does not determine when Gina died, cause or manner of death, or criminal responsibility
records.redaction_notes: Exact addresses, private contact details, unnecessary third-party identifiers, and inflammatory or speculative accusations are omitted.
records.publication_authority: Family-authorized source-status analysis; official records control official timestamps.

records.title: Handwriting and Document Examination Reports
records.summary: Source-controlled summary of retained forensic document examination reports dated June 20, 2024 and April 26, 2026.
scope_limitations: Retained-expert opinions rather than court findings
Full reports were based on submitted materials and identify limitations involving copies and exemplars
Do not determine cause or manner of death
Do not establish criminal guilt or motive
records.redaction_notes: The public summary excludes addresses, signatures, private financial and medical records, and full comparison exhibits.
records.publication_authority: Family-authorized expert-material summary with explicit attribution and limitations.

records.title: Draft Affidavit Working Document
records.summary: Source-status record for a family-created working draft containing proposed declarant accounts, attributed statements, record-dependent assertions, editorial instructions, and unresolved verification items.
scope_limitations: Not represented as a clean final, signed, notarized, filed, or judicially accepted affidavit
Does not independently verify every statement it contains
Does not determine cause or manner of death
Does not establish criminal guilt or motive
records.redaction_notes: The public summary excludes personal contact information, signatures, detailed medical and financial information, inflammatory allegations, and unnecessary third-party identifiers.
records.publication_authority: Family-authorized source-status summary; not represented as a final affidavit or court record.

records.title: Medical-record archive
records.summary: Full medical records are preserved outside the public repository for authorized legal and expert review.
scope_limitations: Source files are excluded from the public repository
No blanket public publication authorization is recorded
Any derivative requires relevance, authority, privacy, third-party, and redaction review
records.redaction_notes: Full records remain restricted; no public source file or private Drive link is exposed.
